phrases: I hope you're happy, because I am

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: ABOUT ME
about.name: Liu Jiaye
about.description:
I am a creative professional in the film and media industry, focusing on visual storytelling and digital art creation. I specialize in blending technological aesthetics with human emotion to craft compelling visual experiences.

I believe every project is a unique journey of exploration. From concept to final presentation, I strive to embody professionalism and passion in every detail.

Whether it's film post-production, motion graphics design, or brand visual identity, I am dedicated to telling stories that resonate through the language of imagery.

items.title: Project One
items.description: An experimental short film exploring the boundaries of light and shadow, blending live action with CGI.

items.title: Project Two
items.description: A 3D motion visual identity system created for a music festival.

items.title: Project Three
items.description: Complete visual identity system for an emerging brand, from logo to omnichannel assets.

items.title: Project Four
items.description: Post-production for an international brand's annual campaign, multi-version global rollout.

items.title: Project Five
items.description: An independently created surrealist short film, selected for multiple international film festivals.

items.title: Project Six
items.description: An MV created for an independent musician, interpreting musical emotion through visual poetics.

items.title: Senior Visual Designer
items.description: Led visual direction and post-production workflow management for commercial projects, guiding a 5-person creative team through multiple large-scale projects.

items.title: Motion Graphics Designer
items.description: Spearheaded brand visual upgrades and motion graphics design projects, serving clients across technology, fashion, and cultural sectors.

items.title: Video Post-Production
items.description: Responsible for editing and post-production of commercials and promotional videos, building extensive project experience and workflow management skills.

items.title: B.A. Digital Media Art
items.description: Majored in Digital Media Art, studying film production, animation design, and interactive media. Participated in multiple student film projects during studies.

manifesto_line1:
Whether as a short film director
or broadcast camera operator
I discovered one thing
manifesto_line2:
Those who can tell
if I'm doing a good job
only 30%
The rest can't see the difference
between passion and phoned-in work
manifesto_line3:
But that 70%
they are the ones who truly decide
the future of global cinema
and television
manifesto_line4:
I have one purpose
to learn how to serve that 70%
and push film and television
to a new summit
cap_tagline: Every skill is a coordinate to the future
cap_footer: EVERY SKILL IS A COORDINATE TO THE FUTURE
cap_1_desc: International English certification, continuously updated. Cross-cultural communication with zero barriers, laying the language foundation for global film collaboration.
cap_2_desc: Chinese mainland C1 license, eligible for IDP at any time. Adapted for international driving needs — no need to hire additional drivers for overseas shoots.
cap_3_desc: Professional stage construction capability with extensive hands-on experience. Completed micro-theater stage design and build — understands structure, materials, and execution.
cap_4_desc: Proficient in using AI for frontend design and app development, dramatically boosting efficiency. This website itself is the best practice of AI-assisted construction.
cap_5_desc: Proficient in various competitive sports. Won the championship in the first Flag Football competition at Sichuan University of Media and Communications.
cap_6_desc: Expert in cable organization and routing. Can independently manage 50m+ XLR and SDI cables with orderly, tangle-free deployment.
cap_7_desc: Solid musical foundation, specializing in classical and electric guitar. Capable of independent composition, recording, and mixing — breathing soul into imagery through sound.
cap_8_desc: Skilled in camera placement and on-site traffic flow design. Planned full-venue movement for immersive galas with professional, conflict-free layouts.
work_card_1_desc: Proficient in multi-scene live directing for news, sports, and theater, coordinating on-site feed switching and broadcast scheduling.
work_card_2_desc: Skilled in multi-camera setups for large-scale live broadcasts including galas and sports events.
work_card_3_desc: Experienced in operating various specifications of film and television cranes for wide-range dynamic shots and aerial cinematography.
work_card_4_desc: Capable of independently handling event documentation and short film production using integrated cameras.
work_card_5_desc: Proficient in CCU camera control systems, unifying color temperature and exposure across multiple camera feeds.
work_card_6_desc: Experienced in both on-location sync sound and ambient recording for live broadcasts and short films.
work_card_7_desc: Proficient with various gimbal stabilization devices for walking follow shots and smooth long takes.
work_card_8_desc: Experienced with professional cinema cameras including DJI Ronin 4D for short films and promotional videos.
work_card_9_desc: Skilled in short film editing and multi-camera editing for efficient event and documentary production.
work_card_10_desc: Proficient in editing, color grading, and broadcast software suites, also utilizing Claude Code and other AI tools for creative production.
Proficient in editing, color grading, and broadcast software suites, also utilizing Claude Code and other AI tools for creative production.
course_1_desc: Lectures on fundamental art theory and characteristics of various art forms, cultivating aesthetic appreciation for film and media majors.
course_2_desc: Systematic study of camera lenses, composition, montage, and sound-image relationships — the foundational course for video creation and film analysis.
course_3_desc: Analysis of classic domestic and international films, deconstructing cinematic language and narrative structure through critical essays.
course_4_desc: Learning the frameworks and analytical perspectives of film criticism, training students to evaluate themes, cinematography, and character expression from a professional viewpoint.
course_5_desc: Learning Photoshop and related tools for image retouching, layout design, and color matching, building the foundation for visual production.
course_6_desc: Mastering basic computer operations and office software to meet the document processing, file formatting, and daily office needs of film and media professionals.
course_7_desc: Advanced study of film criticism theory, conducting in-depth analytical writing across different film genres to enhance written expression and critical thinking.
course_8_desc: Learning video editing principles, shot assembly, transition techniques, and rhythm control to proficiently complete TV programs and video productions.
course_9_desc: Understanding the complete directing workflow — storyboarding, scene blocking, and on-set coordination — culminating in the production of a short film.
course_10_desc: Studying variety shows, talk shows, and documentary formats, analyzing program models, production characteristics, and industry trends.
course_11_desc: Appreciation of avant-garde surrealist experimental films, learning unconventional audio-visual expression techniques to inspire creative filmmaking.
course_12_desc: Lectures on TV program topic selection, creative planning, workflow design, and proposal writing, developing foundational program planning skills.
course_13_desc: Mastering documentary topic selection, field shooting, narrative structure building, and post-production editing to create documentary-style video works.
course_14_desc: Learning story conception, character development, plot structuring, and scriptwriting techniques to cultivate original and adapted screenplay writing ability.
course_15_desc: Studying lighting principles, light-shadow modeling, and color lighting design to master mood creation and character shaping through lighting techniques.
course_16_desc: Systematic study of camera operation, composition and framing, camera movement, and lighting application to develop professional cinematography and image control skills.
course_17_desc: Covering the full production pipeline — pre-production planning, filming, and post-production editing — mastering standardized TV program production and news feature shooting.
course_18_desc: Learning short-form video scripting, shooting, editing, and style positioning for new media platforms, including Douyin account operation.
course_19_desc: Mastering multi-camera live switching, on-site coordination, and program control techniques for galas, variety shows, and live broadcast directing.
course_20_desc: Learning foundational makeup and styling design for film and television characters, adapted for on-set and studio production requirements.
course_21_desc: Analyzing reality show narrative logic, segment design, and documentary-style shooting methods to master reality show planning and post-production editing.
course_22_desc: Surveying the history and stylistic evolution of Western popular music, enhancing musical taste to inform film scoring and program music selection.
course_23_desc: Learning flag football rules, techniques, and team tactics to develop physical fitness, teamwork, and competitive awareness.
course_24_desc: Mastering basic tennis strokes, footwork, and competition rules to cultivate focus, coordination, and consistent exercise habits.

exp_2_content: Brand visual motion design, MG animation and 3D compositing for tech and fashion clients
exp_3_content: Independent directing and cinematography, surrealist short film selected for international festivals
exp_4_content: MV production for independent musicians, interpreting musical emotion through visual poetics
exp_5_content: Post-production for international brand annual campaign, multi-version global rollout
exp_6_content: Experimental creation exploring boundaries of light and shadow, blending live action and CGI
work_1_desc: Together with my classmates, I visited the Xuantong Community in Chengdu and met a group of pure and lovely children. Their parents, who not only shoulder community management duties and serve their neighborhood, have also spontaneously formed a choir for the children. Through their gentle perseverance, they built a stage for the children to express themselves, allowing their innocence and beauty to reach more people through song.
work_1_reflection: In mainland China, I discovered that public understanding of the disabled community remains extremely limited. I had never truly known how they live, learn, or work, nor could I fully comprehend the hardships, grievances, and pain these families endure. But I also witnessed something uniquely Chinese — community neighborhood committees, grassroots self-governing organizations, silently protecting and supporting this special group.
work_1_awards:
Beijing International Film Festival · 32nd College Student Film Festival · Documentary Section
Official Selection
exp_gaming_1_desc: CFML is the highest-level professional esports league for Tencent's CrossFire: Gunfight King, founded in 2016. Featuring a regular season, playoffs, and finals system, it brings together top teams such as AG, Q9, and KZ. Centered on fast-paced FPS combat, it is a benchmark esports event for mobile gaming, combining massive popularity with elite competitive standards. Each match involves only three cameras and two operators, yet each operator must handle both roaming and fixed-position shots — an extremely demanding role. With matches lasting approximately two hours, two matches per day, five days a week, the role places exceptionally high demands on camera operators.
exp_presscon_1_title: Geely Auto · Galaxy E5 · Launch Event
exp_presscon_1_desc: The Geely Galaxy E5 'Meet & Greet' was held at the Sino-Italian Cultural City Reception Hall in Chengdu. The event debuted the Flyme Auto intelligent cockpit and Flyme Sound unbounded audio system, powered by a 7nm Dragon Eagle One chip with 16 speakers and 1000W amplification. The showcase featured live cockpit interaction and audio demonstrations, unveiling the new vehicle alongside in-depth user engagement. Departing from traditional broadcast cameras, this launch event instead opted for Sony FX6 and FX9 cinema cameras for live streaming coverage.
exp_gala_1_desc: Hosted by the Performance Academy of Sichuan University of Media and Communications, this is the university's premier theatrical practice gala, deeply integrated into the teaching system with a 'performance-as-practice, full participation' philosophy. Each edition features 40+ showcases spanning all grade levels across performance and arts education, with everyone both performing and watching. Performances take place across three venues — the Experimental Theater, Art Exchange Center, and the Grand Studio — with each edition lasting one month. I was deeply involved in camera operation and directing for major productions as well as the opening and closing ceremonies.
exp_gala_2_desc: A teaching achievement showcase by the 2022 Dance Performance (Sports Dance) cohort from the Dance Academy of Sichuan University of Media and Communications, held at the university's Arts & Sports Center. This is a key practical showcase for undergraduate students in the program, covering both the Latin and Ballroom disciplines of sports dance.
exp_gala_3_desc: From June 17–20, 2024, the Dance Academy staged four consecutive performances: 'Swing · Sichuan' (Choreography), 'Interstellar Voyage' (Pop Dance / Fitness Dance), 'Dance Trace' (Sports Dance), and 'Summer Flowers Like Dreams' (Folk Dance). I was deeply involved in the live broadcast, using a Canon UHD‑DIGISUPER 111 box lens from the top of the Arts & Sports Center (pics 2, 3), delivering a uniquely distinctive camera perspective that drew enthusiastic audience response. The event was live-streamed on platforms including Dao Zhonghua and China Ethnic News, with over 500,000 online viewers.
exp_gala_4_title: 'Spring Blossoms, Autumn Fruits' Dance Academy 2024-2025 Teaching Showcase
exp_gala_4_desc: The annual flagship teaching showcase at Sichuan University of Media and Communications, held each September. Divided into 'Cultivation' (ballet, folk, pop fundamentals) and 'Harvest' (original productions), it unites all grades to present a year's work — 'sow in spring, reap in autumn.' A living embodiment of the Academy's performance-driven teaching philosophy.
exp_awards_1_title: The 5th 'Read a Good Book' Short Video Competition
exp_awards_1_desc: School of Directing & Editing Arts, Sichuan University of Media and Communications
exp_awards_2_title: 1st American Flag Football Competition, Sichuan University of Media and Communications
exp_awards_3_title: Exclusive Interview — Sichuan Film and Television University
exp_awards_3_desc: I had the honor of being interviewed by our sister institution, Sichuan Film and Television University. The interview was published on the college's official WeChat account. Both schools are based in Chengdu, sharing film and television arts as their core educational focus, and have long maintained a strong partnership.
exp_awards_4_title: Southwest China Grassroots Literary & Art Theory Critics Training
exp_awards_4_desc: 2026 National Arts Fund Art Talent Training Program · Selected as an outstanding student
exp_awards_5_title: Featured on Official Douyin & Xiaohongshu — Sichuan University of Media and Communications
exp_awards_5_desc: Graduation countdown series, highlighting outstanding students' campus work moments
exp_awards_7_desc:
Member of the Communist Youth League
University-level Scholarship Recipient
National Bursary Recipient (3 consecutive years)
Mandarin Proficiency Test Level 2A
exp_sports_1_title: 2024 Thomas & Uber Cup World Badminton Team Championships
exp_sports_1_desc: The 2024 Thomas & Uber Cup opened in Chengdu. BWF President Poul-Erik Høyer Larsen attended the opening ceremony. Players from around the world gathered to celebrate. Team China won both men's and women's team championships.
exp_sports_2_desc: The inaugural FIBA Asia Women's Basketball League was held from September 26-28, 2024 at Phoenix Hill Sports Park in Chengdu. Sichuan Yuanda Meile won all three games to claim the championship, with Han Xu named MVP (pic 5). I received signed jerseys from the Taipei Cathay Life women's basketball team (pic 6).
exp_sports_3_desc: The Wish Today Central Plains Basketball Tournament was held in Zhengzhou in 2025, featuring local streetball brand WT against Xi'an SavageGoat. The event gathered streetball celebrities including Yang Hao and Li Guanyang, who has over 8 million followers. Commentator Master Ma has 5 million followers across platforms. This Henan-Shaanxi showdown became a highly influential streetball event in the Central Plains region.
exp_sports_4_title: 2025 National Village BA Basketball Tournament · Central Division
exp_sports_4_desc: The 2025 National Village BA Central Division was held in Xianfeng, Hubei over 8 days across 4 venues, with 20 teams from 11 provinces competing. 5 teams advanced to the national finals. I followed all venue broadcasts throughout the event, managing all transition work.
exp_sports_5_title: McDonald's Run for Love · Chengdu (8th Edition)
exp_sports_5_desc: The 8th McDonald's 'Run for Love' Chengdu event was held at the Intangible Cultural Heritage Expo Park. Hosted by McDonald's China, nearly 1,000 families participated in a 3km parent-child run. All proceeds went to Ronald McDonald House Charities to support families of children receiving medical treatment away from home. Our team volunteered our filming services for this charitable cause.
exp_sports_6_desc: Basketball influencer Zhou Kaiheng launched the 'Zeus Carnival' Chengdu stop on June 21, 2025 at the Wenjiang Jinqiang International Sports Center. Dubbed China's 'Drew League,' the event used FIBA rules with 12-minute quarters. Zhou led the Dragon Team against LeQiu, featuring NBA and CBA veterans and top domestic players. The event combined high-level competition, fan interaction, and charity, promoting streetball culture and sports-tourism integration. I took a photo with former NBA player, 3-time CBA champion and Finals MVP Sonny Weems (pic 3).
exp_sports_7_title: FIA F4 Chinese Championship · Chengdu Grand Prix
exp_sports_7_desc: Unlike traditional sports events, the broadcast task for the 2025 FIA F4 Chinese Championship Chengdu round was extremely challenging. We abandoned wireless transmission in favor of ultra-long-distance wired cabling across the open, dispersed track — the furthest camera required a 10km transmission line. This involved advance route surveying, cabling node planning, and cable reinforcement to ensure stable HD transmission of high-speed racing footage. Coverage included the F4 Grand Prix, Lotus Cup China, Lynk & Co Cup, and MINTIMES GP.MRC motorcycle series, spanning professional racing and lifestyle experiences.
exp_disclaimer:
All listed projects are updated to June 2026.
Attached photos show partial experiences only.
I certify that all information stated above is true and authentic.

footer.tagline: Writing stories with light, connecting the world with creativity.
